description: Dedicated to Basketball champ Chuck Taylor, this Chuck Taylor All-Star series from converse are also called Chucks and  come in classic designs. Created using canvas and rubber, this range of sneakers from Converse were initially designed to  capture the basketball market, but soon enough turned into hot casual footwear favourites. Upper Canvas upper for easy maintenance and durability Carbon rubber toe box for enhanced protection of the upper foot Long canvas tongue for added comfort and snug Fit Synthetic twill lace running through metallic eyelets for durability and snug fit Midsole Cushioned fabric footbed for comfort and breathability Comfort insole for all-day easy wear Outsole Reinforced guard to protect the forefoot of the shoe and enhance durability Vulcanized rubber outsole for flexibility and traction Waffle pattern outsole for superior grip on all terrains Shoe careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water
